resultList.dtldesc: Experience an elevated urban lifestyle with this sophisticated 3 BHK apartment available for sale in the prestigious Ramky One Galaxia Phase 2, located in the thriving neighbourhood of Nallagandla, Hyderabad. This modern residence offers a perfect blend of luxury and functionality, designed for families and professionals seeking a high-quality living environment in one of the citys most sought-after residential corridors. Positioned on the 7th floor, the apartment provides a serene vantage point while ensuring easy access to the regions primary technology and commercial hubs. With its contemporary architecture and premium community setting, this property represents a distinguished asset for long-term residency.Property SpecificationsThis expansive residence encompasses a total super built-up area of 1,665 sq. ft, featuring a thoughtfully designed layout that maximises both space and natural light. The apartment includes three well-proportioned bedrooms and three modern bathrooms, ensuring optimum privacy for all residents. The floor plan is complemented by private balconies that offer refreshing views and enhanced cross-ventilation. Offered in an unfurnished condition, the property serves as a professional canvas for customisation, featuring high-quality flooring and a seamless finish throughout. The west-facing orientation ensures bright and airy interiors, while the brand-new construction status guarantees a pristine environment for the new owners.FacilitiesResidents of Ramky One Galaxia benefit from an exhaustive range of world-class facilities designed to support a premium lifestyle. The gated community is equipped with round-the-clock security, CCTV surveillance, and high-speed lifts. Essential infrastructure includes 24-hour water supply and a robust power backup system to ensure an uninterrupted daily routine. For leisure and fitness, the development features a fully equipped gymnasium, a swimming pool, and a sprawling clubhouse. The property also includes dedicated covered parking, reflecting the high professional standards of the complex. Every detail of the project is managed to provide a secure, sustainable, and high-standard living experience.LocalityNallagandla is a premier and strategically located neighbourhood in West Hyderabad, renowned for its excellent connectivity to Gachibowli, Hitech City, and the Financial District. The property is ideally situated near major corporate offices, making it a highly practical choice for professionals looking to minimise commute times. The locality is well-served by essential social infrastructure, with reputable schools, multi-speciality hospitals, and vibrant retail centres located in the immediate vicinity. Its proximity to the Lingampally railway station and the Outer Ring Road ensures seamless transport links to the rest of the city and the international airport, making it a highly desirable and prestigious residential address.
